rows.notes: Very clear centered page title at top of folio. No amounts present; clearly a header.
Handwriting faint and abbreviated; the first word is partially obscured by flourish. No amounts visible in the right columns. Chose low confidence due to illegibility of letters.
Place-name 'Longwitham' is legible in the left column. No corresponding amounts on the right for this row.
Handwriting unclear; I read this as 'Minhinret' but letters are uncertain. No amounts visible in the right-side columns.
Text 'Southnewington' is readable; the trailing abbreviation is faint. No amounts on this line.
Description 'Cuddington Rry' matches visible script. The three right-hand columns clearly read '20 00 00' (pounds 20, shillings 0, pence 0). Vertical alignment with ruled lines is clear.
Place-name and abbreviations legible. Right-hand columns read '10 00 00' clearly (10 pounds). Column boundaries are unambiguous.
Description 'Merton pro biennio' readable but the amount column for this line appears blank or the ink is faint; no numeric values could be confidently read.
Name 'Chackill Ann' (surname uncertain but legible enough). Right columns read '3 13 08' clearly. All currency digits within valid ranges.
The description beginning 'Thrup' is partially crossed/obscured and the line contains no visible amount. Low confidence due to abrasion/overwriting.
Text 'Cuddington Vicar' clear. Right-hand columns read '04 00 00' aligned neatly; interpreted as 4 pounds exactly.
Name clearly written. Amount columns read '02 00 00' (2 pounds). Alignment with rulings is unambiguous.

Description 'Sue quitrents Ann' (interpretation of first word uncertain but readable). Amount clearly reads '02 15 7' (2 pounds, 15 shillings, 7 pence). All three currency fields are within valid ranges.
Description readable; there is no amount on this line or it is very faint. I treated it as an entry (sub-item) without a visible amount.

Complex descriptive note referencing multiple small sums; the summed line at right reads '4 04 02'. The description contains multiple figures in-text but the right-hand total is legible as 4 pounds 4 shillings 2 pence. Moderate confidence due to internal numeric notation in the description which could confuse alignment.
Place-name 'Jalcot' (spelling approximate) and 'pro Anno' readable; no amount visible at the right-hand columns for this row.

Long descriptive line listing component years/figures. The right-hand columns appear to show '9 17 10' (interpreted as the total 9 pounds 17 shillings 10 pence). Some stray ink/marks near the pence column produce uncertainty, hence moderate confidence.
Description 'Bampton pro Quadriennio' clear. Amount '4 00 00' is distinct and aligned with the pounds/shillings/pence columns.
The line 'Mountague pro sequianno' is readable but the numeric entry in the right column is faint / ambiguous; I therefore left amounts blank. Slight uncertainty due to faint ink.

Surname 'Hughes' and 'Ann.' readable. The right-hand columns show '00 4 00' (zero pounds, 4 shillings, 0 pence). Slight uncertainty in the superscript after the name (looks like '4?'), but numeric columns are clear.
Name 'Greeneway Ann.' readable. Amount columns show '00 10 00' (10 shillings). There is a small flourish after the name that could be misread as '1s', but alignment to columns is clear.
Entry text 'Walker pro Anno' legible. No numeric value can be confidently read in the right-hand columns for this line.
Description readable but amount column is blank/faded for this line; treated as an entry without visible amount.
Name 'Minne' and 'pro biennio' readable. Right-hand columns clearly read '01 13 4' (1 pound 13 shillings 4 pence). Good alignment with ruling lines.
Single-word entry 'Harthall' legible; no amount visible or it is very faint in the numeric columns.
Description 'Leaden hall pro biennio' readable; associated numeric columns are blank/faint for this line.

Grouped/curly-braced entries begin here. 'Garsington' and 'Molineux Ann.' readable as a grouped header/entry, but the corresponding numeric value(s) along the right are smeared/ambiguous; left blank to avoid erroneous parsing.
Part of the braced group; name 'Sadler Ann.' legible. The numeric column is faint and contains multiple small marks; I could not confidently parse a pounds/shillings/pence for this line.
Name 'Napper Ann.' fairly legible but the right-hand numbers are faint and partially obscured by a spot; left blank for safety.
The phrase 'pro Biennio & dimidio' is readable. The numeric column next to Hopkins contains faint / overlapped marks that could be digits but are not legible enough to extract reliably.
Entry text clear. No distinct amount visible in the right-hand columns for this line.
Likely 'Bensington' or similar; handwriting compressed and partly in shadow. No readable amount in numeric columns.

The text explicitly contains '7.14.7' as part of the description area (appears to be an internal note), but the right-hand ruled numeric columns for this line do not show a clear aligned figure. I left the amount blank and recorded the textual numbers as part of the description. Moderate confidence in the description reading.
Final left-column entry readable. The amount columns on this line appear blank or are obscured by shadow and could not be confidently read.
Bottom-right grand total clearly written as '70. 9. 7' (70 pounds, 9 shillings, 7 pence). Well-aligned with the pounds/shillings/pence columns; good legibility.
